Name: Mirrored Sanctum
Effect: Creatures here are played face-down and only revealed at the end of the game.

Name: The Astral Scriptorium
Effect: Whenever you play a creature here, draw a card.

Name: The Abyssal Spires
Effect: At the start of their last turn, every player may move one creature to this location.

Name: Emberhaven
Effect: If you are winning at this location, your first creature each turn costs one mana less.

Name: Emerald Hollow
Effect: If you have no creatures here, your first creature each turn costs one mana less.

Name: The Prismatic Grotto
Effect: Only creatures costing 5 or less mana can be played here.

Name: The Ironhaven Citadel
Effect: Each creature here has +1 power.

Name: The Spire of the Ancients
Effect: Only creatures with a cost of 3 or higher can be played here.

Name: Inferno Citadel
Effect: If you have only one creature here, it has +5 power.

Name: Inferno's Edge
Effect: You can't play cards here two turns in a row.

Name: Eldrida's Sanctum
Effect: The first player to fill this location may draw a card.

Name: Hollowspire
Effect: The first player to fill this location may get an extra mana crystal.

Name: The Oasis Citadel
Effect: Players may only play a maximum of one creature here in their turn.

Name: The Nexus Haven
Effect: The first player to fill this location may move a creature here to another location.

Name: The Oasis of Refuge
Effect: The first player to fill this location may return a creature here to their owner's hand.

Name: The Citadel of Eldrida
Effect: The first player to fill this location may destroy the lowest power creature here.

Name: The Overlooked Corner
Effect: The first player to fill this location may look at the top three cards of their deck and return them in any order.

Name: The Wysteria Oasis
Effect: Only creatures with a power of 4 or more can be played here.

Name: Whispering Warrens
Effect: Only creatures with a power of 9 or less can be played here.

Name: Market Square
Effect: One more creature can be played here.

Name: Eldrida's Sanctuary
Effect: Place this as a new location. All players can play to this new location. This location has space for five creatures.
